docs.name: Outlined Mega Mark
docs.description: Full-width mega outlined headline with theme-aware stroke colours; optional hover swaps the outline for an SVG gradient stroke (hollow fill).

props.name: children
props.description: Plain-text label rendered once (accessible); SVG mode duplicates visually inside stroke layers only.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Any valid CSS font-size (clamp, rem, px, etc.).

props.name: lightStrokeColor
props.description: Outline colour when the page is in light mode.

props.name: darkStrokeColor
props.description: Outline colour when the page is in dark mode.

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description: Outline width rendered as SVG/CSS stroke. Numeric values (and `"N"` / `"Npx"` strings) are clamped so the stroke never exceeds **1px**; thicker values are capped to a hairline. Other CSS units (`rem`, `em`) pass through and are not clamped.

props.name: fillOnHover
props.description: When true without gradientOnHover, hover fills glyphs with the active stroke colour.

props.name: gradientOnHover
props.description: When true (default), renders **two hollow SVG `<text>` strokes**: a diagonal **idle** stroke using your theme accent (`lightStrokeColor` / `darkStrokeColor`) everywhere, plus a **`linearGradient` stroke** visible only inside a radial **spotlight mask** driven by pointer position. Idle stroke is clipped under the hotspot so the two strokes never visually stack thicker than **1 device px** (`nonScalingStroke`, width capped via `strokeWidth`). When false, `-webkit-text-stroke` markup only.

props.name: outlineGradient
props.description: Vivid hover outline gradient. Shape: `{ stops: string[] /* 2+ CSS colours */, x1?, y1?, x2?, y2? }` — optional line for the SVG linearGradient (`userSpaceOnUse`). Exported from the component module. Overrides `outlineGradientStops`.

props.name: outlineGradientStops
props.description: Shortcut for gradient `stops` only (horizontal default axis). Ignored when `outlineGradient` is set.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Optional Tailwind classes for the outer wrapper.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional Tailwind classes on the SVG (gradient mode) or inner paragraph (plain mode).

docs.overview: With `gradientOnHover` (default), the headline stays hollow (**`fill="none"`**) SVG text: themed **idle** outline (`stroke` from a duplicate `linearGradient` whose stops reuse `--omm-stroke-idle`) fills the framing, while a **`stroke="url(#vividGradient)"` copy** paints only beneath a radial mask that trails the cursor. Pointer mapping runs on the outer wrapper so the spotlight reliably tracks hits across the mega mark box. Customize vivid colours with `outlineGradientStops` or `outlineGradient`. Set `gradientOnHover={false}` for `-webkit-text-stroke`-only markup, or `fillOnHover` for solid hover fill.

scenarios.title: Landing page footer
scenarios.description: Place the mark below legal or link columns; move the pointer over the letters to reveal the gradient stroke along the outline in a moving spotlight.

scenarios.title: Custom stroke and scale
scenarios.description: Tune stroke width and colours for contrast on tinted backgrounds, or shrink fontSize for dense layouts.

scenarios.title: outlineGradientStops shorthand
scenarios.description: When you only need custom colours along the default axis, pass `outlineGradientStops={[...]}` instead of the full `outlineGradient` object.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Decorative display mark; provide visually-hidden text when used as a logo or heading.
